name: Reply to a Facebook comment
description: Solomon posts a reply to a specific Facebook comment on Building Shultz or Irish Craftsman, using the existing reply_fb_comment tool.
trigger_examples: reply to that comment from John on Building Shultz saying thanks for sharing
respond to the FB comment with: appreciate you, brother
post that reply we drafted to comment 12345 on irish craftsman
prompt_template: Use the reply_fb_comment tool with page={{page}}, comment_id={{comment_id}}, message={{reply_text}}. Then confirm to Jed with a one-line summary including the new reply id.
escalation_conditions: missing comment_id (Jed must say which comment)
reply_text contains profanity, refund / legal / threat language → bumped to jed-escalate

smoke_test.trigger_message: Reply to FB comment 99 on building_shultz with: Thanks for sharing brother

notes: Public-brand category means Nathan cannot authorize this alone — only Solomon at high confidence. The existing inline-button flow (Session 7) is the preferred manual path; this dispatch template is for explicit Jed-initiated replies via free-text Telegram.
